entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species being investigated for drought response.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and productivity under drought stress.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output.

entities.name: LYSIMETRIC SYSTEM
entities.description: A system used to measure the amount of water used by plants.

entities.name: POT EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A controlled growth environment using pots.

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to reduce variability.

entities.name: WATER REGIMES
entities.description: The specific patterns of water application in the study.

entities.name: FULL IRRIGATION
entities.description: A water regime providing optimal water supply.

entities.name: INTERMITTENT DROUGHT
entities.description: A water regime where water is withheld at flowering times.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The loss of water vapor from plant leaves.

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass.

entities.name: ROOT DRY MATTER
entities.description: The mass of the roots after drying.

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: The total length of roots per unit volume of soil.

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: Various factors that contribute to the final crop yield.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight or number of pods produced by the plant.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching the mature stage quickly.

entities.name: POD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process and quantity of producing pods.

entities.name: HAULM PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of the vegetative part of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the plant leaves.

entities.name: TTW
entities.description: A trait associated with fodder production.

entities.name: TE
entities.description: A trait associated with fodder production.

entities.name: RDW
entities.description: A trait associated with fodder production.

entities.name: RV
entities.description: A trait associated with fodder production.

entities.name: FODDER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of plant material used as animal feed.
